subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon the Mother Book crieth aloud and summoneth them that dwell upon the earth unto God, the Lord of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه ینادی ام الکتاب و یدعو من علی الارض الی الله رب العالمین و ام
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
